messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0021",
  "title": "游戏内容与系统",
  "page_index": 14,
  "page_range": "14"
}

Section text:
游戏内容与系统

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading “游戏内容与系统” (Game Content and Systems) and contains no substantive text, data, or references. It can only answer the question of what general topic the section covers. It does not contain specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed retrieval questions on those aspects. Any specific information regarding game content or system mechanics would be expected in subsequent or related sections.
